zh.lifeSummary: 當Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin於1190年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，她的父親Albert II de la Tour du Pin28歲，母親Marie Josephine d'Auvergne20歲。她和Aymar IV de Bressieu至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛陽。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin于1190年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，她的父亲Albert II de la Tour du Pin28岁，母亲Marie Josephine d'Auvergne20岁。她和Aymar IV de Bressieu至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫-馬利洛陽。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Alasie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Dominique, Francois, Germaine, Jean Marc, Lucien, Michel, Pierette, Yves.

French (southern): variant of Alary, from the personal name Alary, a variant of Alaric, composed of the ancient Germanic elements ala ‘all’ and ric ‘powerful’. Alternatively, from the personal name Alarie, a feminine form of Alary. The surname Alarie has apparently died out in France. Compare Allery 2.
History: René Alarie dit Grandalarie from Neuville-de-Poitou in Vienne, France, married Louise Thibault in Neuville, QC, in 1681.

variants.name: Allery
meanings: English (Devon): most probably a variant of   Ellery  .
Americanized form of French   Alarie  . In the US, this surname is most common among Native Americans, namely the Turtle Mountain Band of Chippewa Indians.

en.lifeSummary: When Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin was born in 1190, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Albert II de la Tour du Pin, was 28 and her mother, Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Aymar IV de Bressieu. She died in Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin est née en 1190, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Albert II de la Tour du Pin, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Aymar IV de Bressieu. Elle est décédée à Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin 1190 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Albert II de la Tour du Pin 28 und ihre Mutter Marie Josephine d'Auvergne 20. Sie hatte mit Aymar IV de Bressieu mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin è nata il nel 1190 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Albert II de la Tour du Pin, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Aymar IV de Bressieu. Morì nel Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.Bressieux, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアブレシエウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Alasie de la Tour-du-Pinが1190年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Albert II de la Tour du Pinは28歳，母Marie Josephine d'Auvergneは20歳であった。彼女はAymar IV de Bressieuとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエンテ-マリティメロイアンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin(이)가 1190년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert II de la Tour du Pin(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Josephine d'Auvergne(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Aymar IV de Bressieu(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처테-마이팀 로얀에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin nasceu em 1190, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Albert II de la Tour du Pin, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Aymar IV de Bressieu. Ela faleceu em Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin родилась в 1190 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Albert II de la Tour du Pin было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Aymar IV de Bressieu. Она умерла в местности роян, чаренте-маритим, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alasie de la Tour-du-Pin nació en 1190, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Albert II de la Tour du Pin, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marie Josephine d'Auvergne, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Aymar IV de Bressieu. Murió en Royan, Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
